reviews.text: My golden retriever (65lbs) pulled hard during walk and the buckle snapped instantly. Almost lost him near the road. This is dangerously weak.
The plastic buckle on the chest strap broke after just 3 uses. My labrador is strong but not extraordinary. This is a safety hazard.
The silicone hose connecting the pump to the fountain basin developed cracks within 2 weeks. Water started leaking onto the floor every night.
The internal recoil spring failed completely. The tape just hangs limp now. The locking mechanism also jammed. Completely useless for controlling my German Shepherd.
The welding spots where the legs attach to the bowl holder are rusting after 1 month of indoor use. I live in a humid climate but this should not happen this fast.
The reflective stitching came off after first wash. Also the D-ring bent out of shape after my 80lb dog pulled once. Not durable at all.
The UV sterilization lamp inside stopped working after 10 days. The water started developing algae. Customer service is not responding.
The zipper failed and split open along the bottom seam. My cat escaped in the parking lot. The mesh panels are also too thin - easily torn by claws.
The brake button is completely unresponsive. You push it and nothing happens. This is extremely dangerous near traffic. I want a full refund.
The motor burned out after 3 weeks of use. It makes a grinding noise now and the water flow is very weak. The filter cartridge slot also cracked.
The padding on the chest plate flattened after 2 weeks. Now it rubs my dog's skin raw. The adjustable straps also slip - need constant re-tightening.
The food dispenser auger jammed after just 1 week. The motor makes a clicking noise but the auger doesn't turn. kibble gets stuck and mold grows.
The power adapter overheated and melted the plastic housing. I smelled burning plastic. This could have started a fire. Extremely dangerous design.
The tape frayed at the tip clip after 1 month. Now it catches every time I try to lock it. The swivel joint between leash and handle is also stiff.
The elevation platform snapped in half under my golden retriever's weight (70lbs). The plastic composite material is completely inadequate for large breeds.
